hooks.command: cd /Users/loic/Desktop/applicationLearn/my-app && if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain)" ]; then BRANCH="claude/changes-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)"; git checkout -b "$BRANCH" 2>/dev/null || true; git add -A; git commit -m "Claude: auto changes $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')"; git push -u origin "$BRANCH" 2>/dev/null; PR_URL=$(gh pr create --title "Claude changes $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')" --body "Modifications automatiques par Claude - merci de reviewer avant de merger." 2>/dev/null); echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"PR créée : $PR_URL\"}"; else echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"Aucun changement à committer.\"}"; fi
